title: Record<string, Date>
description: `Record<string, Date>` resolves to an object with a `string` index signature whose values are Date; arbitrary string keys are accepted and each Date value round-trips, with the empty object as a boundary sample.
notes: Each index-signature value is a Date — ISO string over JSON (revived `new Date`), 8-byte float64 epoch over binary; keys pass through unchanged.
generated: function NzL_uMq2kWu(v){const _r = {};for (const k0 in v) {_r[k0] = v[k0].toISOString();}return _r}
